discovery_data.venue: Binance USD-M perpetual futures public archive
sources: aggTrades first 10 seconds of each quarter-hour
discovery_data.missing_reference_minutes: drop and start a new causal segment; never impute

economic_hypothesis: Same-direction moderate aggressive flow in both BTC and ETH is a common-information repricing signal. Requiring confirmation in both assets avoids isolated liquidation flow and follows the selected asset for four hours.

signal.decision_time: quarter-hour boundary plus completion of the first 10 seconds
signal.entry: first actual aggregate trade after the first 10 seconds
signal.same_time_priority: descending own_abs_imbalance + counterpart_abs_imbalance + 0.1 * max(own_volume_z, 0), then BTCUSDT before ETHUSDT

execution.screening_stop_policy: minute high/low with adverse bar-open gap; exact candidate-day aggTrade replay required after an OOS pass

selection_disclosure.period_split: required positive aggregate result in both 2023Q3 and 2023Q4, both symbols positive at 20bp over H2, PF at least 1.1, and positive aggregate 30bp H2 result
known_weaknesses: 2023Q3 BTC contribution was negative at 20bp even though Q3 aggregate and H2 BTC were positive
2023 H2 30bp BTC contribution was slightly negative
no protective stop fired in discovery, so the 3% stop is a disaster boundary rather than observed alpha management
selection_disclosure.not_claimed: discovery is exposed and multiple-testing affected; only the one-shot 2024 OOS can promote it

oos_policy.result_if_passed: exact candidate-day aggTrade protective-stop replay, then untouched 2025 holdout
